module.name: spectrum
module.description: A labelled gradient scale with an optional marker — for placing something on a continuum (low↔high, cold↔hot, disagree↔agree).
module.aiSpec:
A SPECTRUM / continuum bar: a gradient from one end to the other with end labels and an optional marker showing where something sits. Block module, params only (no body). Good for maturity, sentiment, positioning. (For discrete categories use a chart; this is a continuum.)
Parameters: `left` / `right` — the end labels (default "Low" / "High"). `value` — 0–100 marker position (default -1 = no marker). `marker` — the marker's caption (default none). `from` / `to` — gradient colours at the left / right ends (default #3b82f6 / #ef4444). `height` — bar thickness in px, 4–60 (default 14). `markercolor` — colour of the marker pin outline and caption chip (default #111). `labels` — true | false (default true): show the end labels below the bar.
Example: <!-- @spectrum left: Manual, right: Automated, value: 70, marker: We are here, height: 20, markercolor: #10b981 -->

param.name: left
param.label: Left label
param.desc: Label at the left end of the bar.

param.name: right
param.label: Right label
param.desc: Label at the right end of the bar.

param.name: value
param.label: Marker position (0-100)
param.desc: Marker position along the bar; -1 = no marker.

param.name: marker
param.label: Marker caption
param.desc: Caption shown above the marker pin.

param.name: from
param.label: Left color
param.desc: Gradient colour at the left end.

param.name: to
param.label: Right color
param.desc: Gradient colour at the right end.

param.name: markercolor
param.label: Marker color
param.desc: Pin outline and caption chip colour; blank = #111.

param.name: labels
param.label: Show end labels
param.desc: Show the left/right labels below the bar.

snippet.label: Spectrum scale
snippet.text: <!-- @spectrum left: Manual, right: Automated, value: 70, marker: We are here -->
snippet.description: A gradient continuum with end labels and a positioned marker.
